one_line_description: Ordinary HNSW baseline vs paper-faithful QLR (Algorithm 1) with query-dependent adaptive HNSW search depth on the TREC-CAsT track (158 GB doc index, 6980 dev queries).
python_interpreter_purpose: Faithful runner uses FAISS 1.9 IndexHNSWFlat.search_level_0 with the 9-argument signature (queries, k, seed_ids, seed_dists, out_D, out_I, nprobe, search_type). This is the same interpreter used by Experiments 1, 5, 6.

shared_external_paths.HYBRID_DOC_INDEX: 158 GB FAISS IndexHNSWFlat over the TREC-CAsT corpus. Loaded from FAITHFUL_DOC_INDEX_SHM if present (mmap), else from HYBRID_DOC_INDEX.
shared_external_paths.PCA_QL_DIR: Directory holding the router HNSW index and PCA joblib. Only ROUTER_INDEX is used by Experiment 7 (PCA is loaded from FAITHFUL_PCA_DIR arrays, not from PCA_QL_DIR/pca_1024_to_256.joblib).
shared_external_paths.ROUTER_INDEX: FAISS IndexHNSWFlat over PCA-projected query-log embeddings (I_Q).  Loaded from FAITHFUL_QUERY_INDEX_SHM if present, else ROUTER_INDEX.
shared_external_paths.QLR_ARTIFACT_DIR: Contains ep_indices.npy (int32 [nQL, 10]) and ep_distances.npy (float32 [nQL, 10]). s_max is derived from the 25th percentile of ep_distances[:,0] (paper definition: 75th percentile of top-1 similarity).
shared_external_paths.EXACT_DIR: exact_indices.npy + exact_scores.npy over the 6980 dev queries (ground truth for acc@10).

faithful_specific_external_paths.FAITHFUL_PCA_DIR: Directory holding pca_mean_1024.npy (float32 [1024]) and pca_components_256x1024.npy (float32 [256, 1024]).  These are the exact PCA arrays used by the reference faithful run; the joblib in PCA_QL_DIR is not used because the faithful implementation expects raw numpy arrays.
faithful_specific_external_paths.FAITHFUL_DOC_INDEX_SHM: Optional /dev/shm path preferred if the file exists (mmap).
faithful_specific_external_paths.FAITHFUL_QUERY_INDEX_SHM: Optional /dev/shm path preferred if the file exists.

baseline_configuration.type: ordinary FAISS IndexHNSWFlat.search (no seeding, no candidate union, no router).
baseline_configuration.ef_used_per_config: cfg.ef_default (32, 48, or 64 depending on the calibration config being measured).
baseline_configuration.interleave: For every query, a baseline HNSW search at cfg.ef_default is timed first, then the QLR search.  Same loaded index, same query order, same warmup.

formula_pseudocode: if s < th:              return FALLBACK_HNSW(q, ef_default)  # not adaptive; full HNSW
adaptive_search_depth_configuration.s_source: router top-1 similarity of the historical query (I_Q[q, :1]).
adaptive_search_depth_configuration.s_max_source: 1.0 - Q25(ep_distances[:,0]) / 2.0 -> paper's 75th percentile of top-1 doc similarity (see runner.py::compute_s_max).
adaptive_search_depth_configuration.adaptive_is: PER-QUERY search-depth, not per-config sweep, not entry-point selection.
explicitly_not: post-hoc ef choice using ground truth
accuracy-aware ef choice using evaluation labels

protocol_semantics.timing_boundary: time.perf_counter_ns() -- per-query total_us includes PCA + router + union + adaptive-ef + seed dist + seeded beam (or PCA + router + fallback HNSW).

outputs_written_by_producer_under_out_di: baseline_sweep_full.json (only if a config is promoted to full)
explicit_scope: Experiment 7 must not be presented as the frozen fixed-ef Result 1 (01_safe_hybrid).
Experiment 7 must not be presented as the cache-warmed native Result 2 (02_cachewarmed_best).
Experiment 7 must not be confused with the fixed-ef Stage-2 grid Result 6 (06_stage2_bounded_pareto).
Historical faithful result metrics (if referenced) are for context only and are not evidence for this submission.
